articles.title: 'Learning Python and working on real projects gave me confidence for my career,' says Uday Kiran Kandagatla, IIT Madras BS learner joining TCS as Systems Engineer
articles.summary: Uday Kiran Kandagatla, a learner in the IIT Madras BS Degree Programme, has joined Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) as a Systems Engineer (Prime). He credits his training in Python, Data Science, Machine Learning, and Computational Thinking for building strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

articles.title: PGCIL admit card 2026 released for DT, JOT and JTT posts at powergrid.in; exam on July 1, download here
articles.summary: PGCIL admit card 2026: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) has released the PGCIL Non Executive Admit Card 2026 for Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee and Junior Technician Trainee posts. Candidates can download hall tickets from powergrid.in ahead of the CBT scheduled on 1 July 2026.

articles.title: RBI Grade B Prelims Result 2026 released at rbi.org.in, Phase 2 merit list PDF out for shortlisted candidates; download here
articles.summary: RBI Grade B Prelims Result 2026: The Reserve Bank of India has released the RBI Grade B Prelims Result 2026 for Officer Grade B (General) recruitment under Panel Year 2026. The Phase 1 examination was held on June 13, 2026, and the result was declared on June 25, 2026.
